name: Awesome-Backdoor-on-LMMs
desc: Awesome-Backdoor-on-LMMs is a collection of state-of-the-art, novel, exciting backdoor methods on LMMs (VLPs, TDMs, VLMs, and Agents).
descFull: Awesome-Backdoor-on-LMMs is a collection of state-of-the-art, novel, exciting backdoor methods on LMMs  (VLPs, TDMs, VLMs, and Agents).
